Could you please check the version of ports/devel/rlwrap/Makefile? This
problem was fixed on 12/12/07. Are you using devfs? Cheers.

(11:03:03) [laszlof@main /usr/ports/devel/rlwrap]% ident Makefile
Makefile:
     $FreeBSD: ports/devel/rlwrap/Makefile,v 1.23 2006/12/12 12:06:37
laszlof Exp $
